name: PER_INTG_OUTBOUND_DATA
description: This table is to track the Outbound data sent to Recruitment partner

columns.Name: OUTBOUND_DATA_ID
columns.Comments: This column is unique identtifier for the row

columns.Name: OUTBOUND_OBJECT_NAME
columns.Comments: This column is to indicate the object being exported to thrid party applications. This columns stores lookup codes for lookup type PER_INTG_EXPORT_JOB .

columns.Name: OUTBOUND_DATA_CACHE
columns.Comments: paylaoad that is being sent to third party application

columns.Name: PARENT_BPEL_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: BPEL composite identifier of the Parent Instance that sends data out

columns.Name: CHILD_BPEL_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: BPEL compoiste Identifier that sends data and spawned by Parent Instance Identifier

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: ESS request Identifier that submitted the outbound data transfer

columns.Name: OUTBOUND_DATA_SENT_TIME
columns.Comments: Date and Time of the outbound data sent

columns.Name: RESULT_RECEIVED_TIME
columns.Comments: date and time of the result receieved from partner.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the data sent to partners.

columns.Name: STATE
columns.Comments: State of the transfer of data to partners

columns.Name: PARTNER_NAME
columns.Comments: name of the partner that data was sent to

columns.Name: PARTNER_MESSAGE_KEY1
columns.Comments: Partner sent message key.

columns.Name: PARTNER_MESSAGE_KEY2
columns.Comments: Partner Sent message key 2

columns.Name: PARTNER_RESPONSE_DOCUMENT
columns.Comments: payload response sent by partner.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise identifier.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BATCH_FETCH_START
columns.Comments: This column stores the fetch start of the records being sent to partners

columns.Name: BATCH_FETCH_SIZE
columns.Comments: This column stores size of the batch that was sent to partners

columns.Name: RECORDS_PROCESSED
columns.Comments: This column holds the number of records processed by partner

columns.Name: RECORDS_ERRORED
columns.Comments: This column holds the number of Records Errored
